prestazioni: APR Stage 3+ turbo kit for the CDNB 2.0TFSI engine (Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbo, upgraded fuel pump, 1000cc injectors, and APR's proprietary ECU calibration for 400+ HP on 93 octane)

034 Motorsport Density Line intake manifold with integrated methanol injection ports for the CDNB engine, paired with a custom 3.5" velocity stack and 4" silicone coupler for optimized airflow and charge cooling

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and high-speed compression) and solid top mounts, specifically valved for the B8 A4's 5-link front and trapezoidal rear suspension geometry
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit for the B8 A4 (custom front bumper with integrated canards, aggressive rear overfenders, and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler for reduced lift and improved high-speed stability)

OEM+ Audi RS5-style LED headlights with LUX H8 V4 bulbs and a custom Morimoto D2S HID projector retrofit, paired with a full carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF) featuring a functional NACA duct for brake cooling

Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5" ET35 forged wheels with 245/35/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with AP Racing CP9660 front brake calipers (6-piston) and 380mm two-piece rotors, along with custom stainless steel braided brake lines
